properties: Sagus raphia, also known as the Nipa palm, has been found to have various therapeutic properties due to its rich composition of bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Its leaves and roots are also known to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in wound healing and reducing inflammation.
